For example, I'll just give you two of them. One is what is the organizational drag inside your organization? So what's the organizational drag, one to 10? A second metric would be where is AI as a first-class citizen in your company right now? If it's a tool injected by IT, you're on the low end of the score. You score yourself. We'll have this on the website for people to take for free. Evaluate yourself. It's a one to a seven thing. The next step is you take the most prescriptive workflows you have in your organization and start mapping them and documenting so you have clear knowledge. There's a bunch of steps you're doing as a video producer that may not be obvious from the outside. They're not documented anywhere. And if you lose that person, an AI can't do them right away. You're trying to do something, but the culture is killing you.
